description: Use this API to tabulate those buses where voltage magnitude is beyond their normal or emergency voltage limits. This check may be performed for all buses in the working case or for all buses in a specified subsystem. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.1.0. ierr = checkvoltagelimits(sid, all, opt, thrsh)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined . (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag . (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: opt
parameters.description: Set of voltage limits to be used. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: thrsh
parameters.description: Voltage limit threshold (-0.05 < thrsh < 0.05). (input; 0.0 by default).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

thrsh.description: log voltages above upper limit or below lower limit.
log voltages beyond or within THRSH of a limit.
log voltage outside a limit by more than (-THRSH).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
